get.description: List all invites for a project
List all pending invites for the authenticated user

post.description:
Create a new field for a project.
The field geometry is validated to be a polygon, and an address is fetched based on the geometry's centroid.
Geometry is normalized to GeoJSON format or wkt

get.description: Fetches all available crop varietes for a certain crop_code
